note: Upload this as calllog_descriptions.status.json and change mode when a one-shot sync action is needed.

modes.authoritative_override_reverse: Server live copy is authoritative and replaces the GitHub backup, then this status resets to authoritative_maintain_backup.
modes.authoritative_maintain_backup: Server live copy is authoritative; GitHub maintains its backup but does not overwrite the server copy.
modes.restore_backup: GitHub backup is restored to the server live copy, then this status resets to authoritative_maintain_backup.
